name: Philadelphia Cheese Steak Sandwich (Lower Fat)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup thinly sliced green bell pepper
1/2 cup thinly sliced red bell pepper
12 ounces Swanky Flanky steak, very thinly sliced
4 French or hoagie-style rolls, halved lengthwise
4 ounces reduced-fat cheddar or Muenster cheese, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a nonstick medium skillet with cooking spray.
2. Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add onion and bell peppers to the skillet. Cook, stirring constantly, for 2 to 3 minutes, adding a little water from time to time to prevent sticking and overbrowning.
4. Preheat the broiler.
5. Divide the sliced flank steak evenly over the opened rolls.
6. Cover with the onion mixture.
7. Top with cheese.
8. Broil, close to the heat source, for 1 minute or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
